Login.subtitle: Sign in to access your prospect intelligence.
Login.errorAccessDenied: Access denied. Contact your admin to be added to the allowlist.
Login.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — link sent to {email}
Login.restrictedNote: Access is restricted. If you have trouble signing in, contact your SalesLord admin.

AccessDenied.title: Access denied
AccessDenied.body: Your account isn't on the SalesLord access list. Contact your admin to be added.

Sidebar.summary: {prospectCount, plural, one {# prospect} other {# prospects}} · {openCount, plural, one {# window open} other {# windows open}}

Setup.title: Profile & settings
Setup.intro: This context is injected into every research and email generation call. The more complete it is, the better the output.
Setup.onboardingBannerTitle: Create your first product to get started.
Setup.onboardingBannerBody: Briefs, email drafts, and research are all generated against your product context — ProspectLord unlocks once you've added at least one.
Setup.productsHint: What you sell. All of your products are injected into every research and email call. Yours alone — update them any time, including when you change companies.
Setup.voiceUncalibrated: Add voice samples for best results
Setup.backgroundHint: Relevant experience, past companies, or expertise the model can reference naturally in outreach.
Setup.backgroundPlaceholder: e.g. 8 years in data engineering before moving to sales. Built pipelines at Stripe and Plaid. Sold to CTOs and VPs of Engineering at Series B–public companies.
Setup.voiceHint: Paste 2–5 of your best-performing emails or LinkedIn messages. The assistant will match your sentence length, how you open, how you close, and what you don't say. More samples = better calibration. These are never shared or used for training.
Setup.voicePlaceholder: Paste your best emails or LinkedIn messages here…
Setup.icpHint: Who you're trying to reach. Used to filter and prioritize research.
Setup.icpPlaceholder: e.g. Series B+ data infrastructure companies, 200–2,000 employees, VP or above economic buyer, Snowflake or dbt in the stack, US-based.
Setup.languageHint: Your language for the interface and for everything the assistant generates. Emails and pitches can be overridden per prospect.
Setup.targetingHint: Seniority and function rules used to tier decision makers on every research run. Shared across the team.
Setup.apiKeyHint: Required to run research and email generation. Get yours at console.anthropic.com. Stored securely — never shown again after saving.
Setup.apiKeyPlaceholderReplace: Enter new key to replace existing…
Setup.apiKeyNote: Leave blank to keep your current key. Your key is used only server-side and never logged.
Setup.changesNote: Changes take effect on the next research or follow-up generation.

Prospect.noResearchBody: Research may still be running, or it was interrupted. You can run it again below.

PitchOpener.title: Pitch opener
PitchOpener.eventAuto: Auto — best-fit signal for this product
PitchOpener.eventPlaceholder: e.g. migrating off legacy Pentaho, retiring on-prem warehouse
